title: OrganiGram Holdings (OGI) Q4 2021 Earnings Call Transcript
text: OrganiGram Holdings Q4 2021 Earnings Call Summary. Financial Results: Gross revenue grew 24% from Q3 2021 and 43% from the same period in fiscal 2020 to $36.2 million and net revenue grew 22% from both Q3 2021 and from the same period in fiscal 2020, respectively, to $24.9 million. Revenue Drivers: These revenue increases were primarily due to higher recreational net revenue, which grew 36% from Q3 and 52% from the same period in 2020 due to an increase in sales from the flower categories. Pre-Earnings Expectations: OrganiGram was expected to deliver a year-over-year decline in earnings on higher revenues when reporting results for the quarter ended August 2021. The cannabis producer was expected to post a quarterly loss of $0.04 per share. The earnings report was released on November 23, 2021.
